understanding.goal_understanding: The objective is to navigate each level by moving horizontally and using gravity to reach the '+' goal gem tile, while avoiding spikes that cause instant failure.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal moves (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) are followed by automatic gravity-driven vertical movement until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks ('x') to clear paths. UNDO reverts the previous action. Gravity direction can be up or down; the goal is always in the direction of gravity. Some levels feature a rising platform that forces upward progress; only horizontal moves advance its timer, not clicks.
